text: Why is the 'maximum surface temperature' identified, for electrical equipment used in hazardous areas onboard LNG carriers?

options.text: The limit is on minimum surface temperature on LNG carriers as the cargo is cryogenic
Equipment should operate within these limits to reduce the power and boil-off consumption
Equipment should operate within these limits to prevent the formation of a hot surface
Equipment should operate within these limits to reduce the heat transfer to the cryogenic cargo
